questionEdit.editedStem: REAL011 修订后题干：已调整题干、分值、难度和来源框。

rollback: delete from review_queue_items where payload->>'questionItemId' = '373504d4-2f32-4ece-b90f-444a3808024d' or payload->>'sourceRegionId' = '40f7c5b2-1724-46fa-9c5d-237c3c2e491a'; delete from question_blocks where question_item_id = '373504d4-2f32-4ece-b90f-444a3808024d'; delete from question_items where id = '373504d4-2f32-4ece-b90f-444a3808024d';
summaryChinese: 题干、答案、解析、题型、分值、难度和 SourceRegion bbox 均可修订，且题目与来源框修订都有 audit。
